languages.text: Изрытая огромными туннелями, поверхность планеты напоминает гнездо насекомых гигантских размеров. От взгляда на странный пейзаж по спине ползут мурашки. Корабельные {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} не фиксируют ничего живого на поверхности планеты.

traits.locale_text: Изрытая огромными туннелями поверхность планеты напоминает гнездо насекомых гигантских размеров. От взгляда на странный пейзаж по спине ползут мурашки. Корабельные {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} не фиксируют ничего живого на поверхности планеты.

languages.text: The planet, riddled with huge tunnels, resembles an ant hill of gigantic proportions. Even looking down on the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface.
languages.original_text: Изрытая огромными туннелями, поверхность планеты напоминает гнездо насекомых гигантских размеров. От взгляда на странный пейзаж по спине ползут мурашки. Корабельные {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} не фиксируют ничего живого на поверхности планеты.

traits.locale_text: The planet's surface, riddled with huge tunnels, resembling an insect nest of gigantic proportions. Even looking upon the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface of the planet.

The planet, riddled with huge tunnels, resembles an ant hill of gigantic proportions. Even looking down on the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface.

The planet's surface, riddled with huge tunnels, resembling a dried-out sponge of gigantic proportions. Even looking upon the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's augurs do not detect any signs of life on the surface of the planet.

The planet's surface, riddled with huge tunnels, resembling an insect nest of gigantic proportions. Even looking upon the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface of the planet.

The planet's surface, riddled with huge tunnels, resembling an insect nest of gigantic proportions. Even looking upon the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface of the planet.

The planet, riddled with huge tunnels, resembles an ant hill of gigantic proportions. Even looking down on the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface.

languages.text: 巨大なトンネルが張り巡らされた、まるで巨大なスポンジが乾いたような惑星。その不気味な風景を眺めるだけで、血が冷える。船の探査機は、惑星の表面に生命の兆候を検知していない。
languages.original_text: The planet's surface, riddled with huge tunnels, resembling a dried-out sponge of gigantic proportions. Even looking upon the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's augurs do not detect any signs of life on the surface of the planet.

traits.locale_text: 巨大なトンネルが張り巡らされた、まるで巨大なスポンジが乾いたような惑星。その不気味な風景を眺めるだけで、血が冷える。船の探査機は、惑星の表面に生命の兆候を検知していない。

languages.text: El planeta está horadado por enormes túneles que le confieren un aspecto similar a un hormiguero de proporciones titánicas. El siniestro paisaje te hiela la sangre. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} de la nave no detectan signos de vida en la superficie.
languages.original_text: The planet, riddled with huge tunnels, resembles an ant hill of gigantic proportions. Even looking down on the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface.

traits.locale_text: El planeta está horadado por enormes túneles que le confieren un aspecto similar a un hormiguero de proporciones titánicas. El siniestro paisaje te hiela la sangre. Los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} de la nave no detectan signos de vida en la superficie.

languages.text: 这颗行星布满巨大的隧道，犹如一个巨大的蚁巢。仅是俯瞰这诡异的地貌，便足以让人脊背发凉。舰船的{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}未在行星表面侦测到任何生命迹象。
languages.original_text: The planet, riddled with huge tunnels, resembles an ant hill of gigantic proportions. Even looking down on the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface.

traits.locale_text: 这颗行星布满巨大的隧道，犹如一个巨大的蚁巢。仅是俯瞰这诡异的地貌，便足以让人脊背发凉。舰船的{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}未在行星表面侦测到任何生命迹象。

languages.text: Der von riesigen Gängen durchzogene Planet erinnert an einen riesigen Ameisenhaufen. Allein der Blick auf die unheimliche Umgebung lässt das Blut in den Adern gefrieren. Die {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} des Schiffs entdecken an der Oberfläche keinerlei Leben.
languages.original_text: The planet, riddled with huge tunnels, resembles an ant hill of gigantic proportions. Even looking down on the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface.

traits.locale_text: Der von riesigen Gängen durchzogene Planet erinnert an einen riesigen Ameisenhaufen. Allein der Blick auf die unheimliche Umgebung lässt das Blut in den Adern gefrieren. Die {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} des Schiffs entdecken an der Oberfläche keinerlei Leben.

languages.text: Devasa tünellerle delik deşik olmuş gezegen, devasa boyutlarda bir karınca yuvasını andırıyor. Bu ürkütücü manzaraya bakmak bile insanın kanını donduruyor. Geminin {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}alametleri{/g}, yüzeyde hiçbir yaşam belirtisi saptamıyor.
languages.original_text: The planet, riddled with huge tunnels, resembles an ant hill of gigantic proportions. Even looking down on the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface.

traits.locale_text: Devasa tünellerle delik deşik olmuş gezegen, devasa boyutlarda bir karınca yuvasını andırıyor. Bu ürkütücü manzaraya bakmak bile insanın kanını donduruyor. Geminin {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}alametleri{/g}, yüzeyde hiçbir yaşam belirtisi saptamıyor.

languages.text: La planète est criblée de gigantesques tunnels qui lui donnent l'air d'une immense fourmilière. Le simple fait de contempler une telle désolation vous glace le sang. Les {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} du vaisseau ne détectent aucun signe de vie à sa surface.
languages.original_text: The planet, riddled with huge tunnels, resembles an ant hill of gigantic proportions. Even looking down on the eerie landscape chills the blood. The ship's {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} do not detect any signs of life on the surface.

traits.locale_text: La planète est criblée de gigantesques tunnels qui lui donnent l'air d'une immense fourmilière. Le simple fait de contempler une telle désolation vous glace le sang. Les {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} du vaisseau ne détectent aucun signe de vie à sa surface.
